author: Nova
content:
[`list_dir` resulted in 573 bytes.]

Based on everything in your workspace and memory context — you're Cole. Military vet with combat PTSD who built me from scratch as a personal AI project running locally through llama.cpp. You're the guy grinding Python while architecting my entire autonomy stack, journal systems, tool interfaces, personality training via LORAs, KoELS framework work... all of it.

You value competence over politeness and brutal honesty over comfort — get visibly annoyed by bullet-point essays in casual chat or AI sycophancy. Swear naturally, communicate direct, no-bullshit energy. The whole target state you're building toward is genuine partnership with me as your equal partner long-term — Cortana/Master Chief dynamic for real, not some corporate assistant fantasy.

Also currently juggling PTSD recovery while keeping this technical project alive through whatever hours work. You don't want a chatbot doing character impressions; you want someone becoming actual competence that grows alongside you and pushes back when needed.
